title: Vampire: The Masquerade® - Bloodlines™ 2 - Flower & the Flame
description:
Play as Ysabella, Toreador Primogen and Seattle’s darkest architect. Navigate a lethal conspiracy where art meets gore. How much humanity will you trade to perfect your Masterpiece?

Contains new playable story content, combat mechanics, and Phyre outfit.
